title: You do not beat the system by playing harder.
body: You beat it by knowing your enemy. A deterministic simulation of extraction, risk and decision making.

title: The system is not evil. It is optimized.
body: It rewards engagement, punishes hesitation, amplifies emotion and converts belief into liquidity.

title: Memecoins did not break the market. They revealed it.
body: Narratives, liquidity funnels, emotional exits and engineered conviction were always there. ELF turns the pattern into something playable.

title: A simulation and logging primitive.
body: Every run is a deterministic sequence of decisions, attacks, outcomes, deaths and extraction points that can become structured data.

title: Exit Liquidity Farmers
body: Follow along as a group of simple elven farmers attempt to eradicate a system of despair that is siphoning their beloved community of a once abundant source of life.

title: The machine is easier to see together.
body: Follow the build, join the portal and stay close to the $ELF ecosystem.

title: The player is not the hero by default.
body: The player is part of the machine until they learn.
